'''鈭歠-sh-z''' ('''kafashaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:codicil|codicil]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-sh-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:codicil|codicil]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歠-sh-z
|-
! Lemma
| kafashaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifashaz|thifashaz]] || [[word:jifashaz|jifashaz]] || [[word:shifashaz|shifashaz]] || [[word:kifashaz|kifashaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufashaz|thuthufashaz]] || [[word:jujufashaz|jujufashaz]] || [[word:shushufashaz|shushufashaz]] || [[word:kukufashaz|kukufashaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufashaz|thufashaz]] || [[word:jufashaz|jufashaz]] || [[word:shufashaz|shufashaz]] || [[word:kufashaz|kufashaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufashaz|thufashaz]] || [[word:jufashaz|jufashaz]] || [[word:shufashaz|shufashaz]] || [[word:kufashaz|kufashaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefashaz|thefashaz]] || [[word:jefashaz|jefashaz]] || [[word:shefashaz|shefashaz]] || [[word:kefashaz|kefashaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofashaz|thothofashaz]] || [[word:jojofashaz|jojofashaz]] || [[word:shoshofashaz|shoshofashaz]] || [[word:kokofashaz|kokofashaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofashaz|thofashaz]] || [[word:jofashaz|jofashaz]] || [[word:shofashaz|shofashaz]] || [[word:kofashaz|kofashaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofashaz|thofashaz]] || [[word:jofashaz|jofashaz]] || [[word:shofashaz|shofashaz]] || [[word:kofashaz|kofashaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙fashaz|th忙fashaz]] || [[word:j忙fashaz|j忙fashaz]] || [[word:sh忙fashaz|sh忙fashaz]] || [[word:k忙fashaz|k忙fashaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafashaz|thathafashaz]] || [[word:jajafashaz|jajafashaz]] || [[word:shashafashaz|shashafashaz]] || [[word:kakafashaz|kakafashaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafashaz|thafashaz]] || [[word:jafashaz|jafashaz]] || [[word:shafashaz|shafashaz]] || [[word:kafashaz|kafashaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafashaz|thafashaz]] || [[word:jafashaz|jafashaz]] || [[word:shafashaz|shafashaz]] || [[word:kafashaz|kafashaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafashaz|shafashaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafashaz|goshafashaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafashaz|gokishafashaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafashazn眉|shafashazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafashaznkn眉|goshafashaznkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafashazn眉|gokishafashazn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafashazsh毛|shafashazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafashaznksh毛|goshafashaznksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafashazsh毛|gokishafashazsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafashazro|shafashazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafashaznkro|goshafashaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafashazro|gokishafashazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafashazmu|shafashazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafashaznkmu|goshafashaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafashazmu|gokishafashazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafashazsher|shafashazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafashaznksher|goshafashaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafashazsher|gokishafashazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafashazng|shafashazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafashaznkng|goshafashaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafashazng|gokishafashazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafashazya|shafashazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafashaznkya|goshafashaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafashazya|gokishafashazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafashazyam|shafashazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafashaznkyam|goshafashaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafashazyam|gokishafashazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafashazn眉sh毛|shafashazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafashaznkn眉sh毛|goshafashaznkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafashazn眉sh毛|gokishafashazn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafashazn眉ro|shafashazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafashaznkn眉ro|goshafashaznkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafashazn眉ro|gokishafashazn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafashazn眉mu|shafashazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafashaznkn眉mu|goshafashaznkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafashazn眉mu|gokishafashazn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafashazsh毛n眉|shafashazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafashaznksh毛n眉|goshafashaznksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafashazsh毛n眉|gokishafashazsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafashazsh毛ro|shafashazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafashaznksh毛ro|goshafashaznksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafashazsh毛ro|gokishafashazsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafashazsh毛mu|shafashazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafashaznksh毛mu|goshafashaznksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafashazsh毛mu|gokishafashazsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafashazron眉|shafashazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafashaznkron眉|goshafashaznkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafashazron眉|gokishafashazron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafashazrosh毛|shafashazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafashaznkrosh毛|goshafashaznkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafashazrosh毛|gokishafashazrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafashazromu|shafashazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafashaznkromu|goshafashaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafashazromu|gokishafashazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafashazmun眉|shafashazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafashaznkmun眉|goshafashaznkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafashazmun眉|gokishafashazmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafashazmush毛|shafashazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafashaznkmush毛|goshafashaznkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafashazmush毛|gokishafashazmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafashazmuro|shafashazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafashaznkmuro|goshafashaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafashazmuro|gokishafashazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
